top_signals.title: Shipping Costs Spike Amidst Iran War Anxiety
top_signals.summary: The cost of shipping a container of goods from Asia to the United States has doubled since the start of the Iran war, driven by spiking fuel prices and an uptick in demand from importers who are worried costs will only rise further as the conflict…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: German air show opens under shadow of Iran war, fighter project collapse
top_signals.summary: Airbus, which represented Germany and Spain in FCAS, is increasingly looking to Sweden’s Saab as a preferred partner, according to sources.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump Threatens to Attack Iran, Claims Oil Has Been Transported Through Hormuz
top_signals.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump said on Wednesday that the United States will attack Iran if no peace deal is secured and that the U.S. military secretly escorted ships carrying more than 100 million barrels of oil out of the Strait of Hormuz."We're going to be attacking them…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Stocks Recover After US Ends Strikes on Iran: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Traders are buying the dip in stocks as a swift end to the latest round of US strikes against Iran raised expectations that talks to reopen the Strait of Hormuz will get back on track.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cascading Failure: The Spanish Navy’s Reserve Squadron and the Tragedy of Unpreparedness
top_signals.summary:
It is in long periods of peace that victories and defeats are prepared. Peace is the period for men of government, just as war is for men of action. Without the calm preparation carried out by the former, the courage and energy of the latter are of no use. — Captain First Class Ramón Auñón y Villalón, 1885.The Spanish-American War is widely remembered as a moment of triumph for the United States and a disaster for Spain. The war began in 1898 after Spain. The war began in 1898 after Spain’s brutal effort to suppress Cuba’s independence revolt, American outrage

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Introducing the AI Economics Institute
top_signals.summary: Overview of AI Economics Institute, its role in analysing AI’s economic impacts and how it will support evidence-based policy making in the UK.

top_signals.title: Two Vessels Under Panama, Barbados Flags Damaged in Attack in Ukrainian Waters
top_signals.summary: Two vessels under Panamanian and Barbadian flags were damaged after being attacked while moving through Ukraine's Black Sea navigation corridor, the Ukrainian Ports Authority said on Wednesday.The authority, writing on Telegram, said one vessel was headed for the port of Odesa…

top_signals.title: Private credit has ‘growing pains,’ but a Man Group exec sees opportunities in higher rates
top_signals.summary: Private credit is facing liquidity-related “growing pains,” but higher-for-longer interest rates could create attractive yield opportunities, Man Group said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CISA to transform how it assesses cyber vulnerabilities and risks, Andersen says
top_signals.summary: A binding operational directive being released Wednesday will direct federal agencies to change the way they address vulnerabilities by elevating some while putting others to the side.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
